summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Paper Execution feature. Fixed backend bug (confidence None check). All 25 backend API tests pass. All frontend UI elements verified working correctly.

fixed.issue: TypeError when confidence is None - '<' not supported between instances of 'NoneType' and 'float'
fixed.fix: Added None check for confidence before comparison: if confidence is None: confidence = 1.0

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/paper/settings returns all expected fields
Backend: Kill switch toggle logged in audit
Backend: POST /api/paper/queue creates trade with pending status
Backend: GET /api/paper/stats returns all status counts
Backend: POST /api/paper/trade/{id}/approve changes status to approved
Backend: POST /api/paper/trade/{id}/reject changes status to rejected
Backend: Kill switch blocks execution with violation message
Backend: GET /api/paper/audit returns audit log entries
Backend: Audit log contains trade actions
Backend: Execute approved trade (fails with Alpaca 401 - expected)
Backend: Cannot execute pending trade directly
Frontend: Paper Trading Only badge visible
Frontend: Account stats row (Buying Power, Cash, Pending, Approved, Executed, Failed)
Frontend: Kill Switch toggle (defaults to Inactive/OFF)
Frontend: Manual Approval Required toggle (defaults to ON)
Frontend: Auto Execution toggle (defaults to OFF)
Frontend: Block Extended Hours toggle (defaults to ON)
Frontend: Queue New Trade form with Symbol, Side, Quantity, Strategy, Reason inputs
Frontend: Tabs (Queue, Executed, Positions, Audit Log) present
Frontend: Trade cards with status badges
Frontend: Approve/Reject/Cancel/Execute buttons on trade cards
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed confidence None check in check_risk_controls - was causing 500 error when trades had no confidence value
All Paper Execution endpoints working correctly
Alpaca API returns 401 (invalid keys) - execution will fail but workflow and risk checks work correctly
Default settings correctly configured: Manual Approval ON, Auto Execution OFF, Kill Switch OFF
seed_data_creation: Test trades created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paper Execution feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: /api/paper/settings, /api/paper/kill-switch, /api/paper/queue, /api/paper/trade/{id}/approve|reject|cancel|execute, /api/paper/risk-check, /api/paper/audit, /api/paper/stats. Frontend shows all controls with proper defaults. Note: Alpaca API returns 401 (invalid keys) - execution will fail but workflow is correct. Fixed bug: confidence None check in check_risk_controls.

page_elements: Header with Paper Trading Only badge
Account stats row (Buying Power, Cash, Pending, Approved, Executed, Failed)
Safety Controls section with toggles and sliders

bug_fixed.issue: Trade execution failing with TypeError: '<' not supported between instances of 'NoneType' and 'float'
bug_fixed.root_cause: check_risk_controls method used trade.get('confidence', 1.0) which returns None when key exists with None value
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to explicit None check: confidence = trade.get('confidence'); if confidence is None: confidence = 1.0

alpaca_integration_note: Alpaca API returns 401 (invalid keys) - this is expected. The workflow (queue → approve → execute) and risk controls work correctly. Actual execution fails due to invalid API keys but the error is handled gracefully.
